programme.title: GP racing
programme.desc: The show delves into the world of F1 technology where teams try to gain split second advantages over their rivals with cutting-edge engineering. GP Racing covers the colorful global spectacle that is the F1 World Championship.

programme.title: GP racing
programme.desc: The show delves into the world of F1 technology where teams try to gain split second advantages over their rivals with cutting-edge engineering. GP Racing covers the colorful global spectacle that is the F1 World Championship.

programme.title: Sailing to tokyo 2019/
programme.desc: This monthly magazine is dedicated to the story of Olympic Sailing, as the world's stars names and best rookies strive to compete on the world's greatest sports stage and claim their medals at the Olympic Games. To be a champion you need power, strength, skill, mental toughness, supreme fitness and strategy. Broadcast by over 20 broadcasters in more than 95 countries, Sailing to Tokyo follows the long journey and defining moments in athletes' careers as they aspire to make Olympic history.

programme.title: Sailing to tokyo
programme.desc: This magazine is the story of Olympic Sailing, as the world's best strive to compete on the world's greatest sports stage and claim their medals at the Olympic Games. Dedicated to Olympic sailing, Sailing to Tokyo follows the long journey and defining moments in athletes' careers as they dream to make Olympic history.

programme.title: Outdoor sports show
programme.desc: Following a successful first run, The Outdoor Sports Show has returned on screens in early 2018, by showcasing a diverse array of outdoor sports destined to reach again millions of audiences globally. There are no limits to the content of the Outdoor Sports Show, which covers everything, from professional and recreational to the extreme and adventure sports. From marathon races to climbing, skiing to surfing, hiking to triathlon, sailing to cycling - human meets nature on a thrilling journey of performance.

programme.title: Autospeed
programme.desc: AutoSpeed is all action, all style and all the news. Weekly Grand Prix update, race previews and feature stories. Action from the world of international racing and rallying. New car releases from the world's prestige motor shows and the future of motoring are all covered.

programme.title: Autospeed
programme.desc: AutoSpeed is all action, all style and all the news. Weekly Grand Prix update, race previews and feature stories. Action from the world of international racing and rallying. New car releases from the world's prestige motor shows and the future of motoring are all covered.

programme.title: Xterra adventure/
programme.desc: XTERRA is the world's premier off-road multisport event. An extreme competition, the XTERRA format combines swimming with mountain biking and trail running. It has been described as one part triathlon, one part mountain bike race, and one part "survival of the fittest". The typical distances are a 1.5k swim, 30k mountain bike, and 10k trail run.

programme.title: Xterra adventure/

programme.title: Ultra running polska
programme.desc: Ultra Running Polska is two people, a married couple who, out of love for the mountains, created the first Polish series about mountain running. And they want to infect others with this love.

programme.title: Hellas rally raid 2019
programme.desc: Seven days of riding on the remote areas of Central Greece mountains. It is a unique group or personal experience in the remote mountains, forests, beaches, valleys and more in six days escape raid. The everyday route is between 160-250 kilometres, 90% of them are off-road.

programme.title: Hellas rally raid 2021
programme.desc: Seven days of riding on the remote areas of Central Greece mountains. It is a unique group or personal experience in the remote mountains, forests, beaches, valleys and more in six days escape raid. The everyday route is between 160-250 kilometres, 90% of them are off-road.

programme.title: Boat show 4k
programme.desc: The Boat Show is a program dedicated to nautical lovers, boat owners, or dreamers, like ourselves. The Boat Show covers water tests, reports from international boat shows, visits to shipyards, boat maintenance and technology, everyday boat repair and maintenance tips, races, events, celebrities, cooking, safety, charters and ports. It is made with passion by a team of experts with more than 15 years of experience.

programme.title: Inside sailing
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Inside sailing
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Cape epic
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

With amazing footage and commentary from experienced cyclists, daredevil skills and awe-inspiring camerawork, this groundbreaking show is a must for cycling enthusiasts and novices alike.

programme.title: Better than four : Santos Fat Tire & Ricky Crompton
programme.desc: Initially a bi-weekly (26×26') sports series with a difference, 'Better Than Four' brings viewers all the action from all things two-wheeled. Each episode is also packed with tips and tricks to try at home, as well as reviews of the latest kit, equipment and cycling films. programme.title: Hellas rally raid 2019
programme.desc: Seven days of riding on the remote areas of Central Greece mountains. It is a unique group or personal experience in the remote mountains, forests, beaches, valleys and more in six days escape raid. The everyday route is between 160-250 kilometres, 90% of them are off-road.

programme.title: Hellas rally raid 2021
programme.desc: Seven days of riding on the remote areas of Central Greece mountains. It is a unique group or personal experience in the remote mountains, forests, beaches, valleys and more in six days escape raid. The everyday route is between 160-250 kilometres, 90% of them are off-road.

programme.title: Xterra adventure/
programme.desc: XTERRA is the world's premier off-road multisport event. An extreme competition, the XTERRA format combines swimming with mountain biking and trail running. It has been described as one part triathlon, one part mountain bike race, and one part "survival of the fittest". The typical distances are a 1.5k swim, 30k mountain bike, and 10k trail run.

programme.title: Supercar tv
programme.desc: Supercars can be customised to your taste by fantastic designers and dedicated technical teams such as VoS and Haman in Germany, and then it's time to cross the Alps.

programme.title: Supercar tv

programme.title: Boat show 4k
programme.desc: The Boat Show is a program dedicated to nautical lovers, boat owners, or dreamers, like ourselves. The Boat Show covers water tests, reports from international boat shows, visits to shipyards, boat maintenance and technology, everyday boat repair and maintenance tips, races, events, celebrities, cooking, safety, charters and ports. It is made with passion by a team of experts with more than 15 years of experience.

programme.title: Sports adventure
programme.desc: Sports Adventure Episode 607: The Desert Dash (Mountain Bike Racing). Namibia, the driest country in Sub-Saharan Africa and one of the least-densely populated in the world, hosts one of mountain biking's greatest challenges..."The Desert Dash"... 369 kilometers in just 24 hours, across the world's oldest desert; it's not one for the feint-hearted.

programme.title: Sports adventure
programme.desc: Sports Adventure Episode 608: GS Trophy Mongolia (Off-Road Motorcycle Race). Teams from 21 nations tackle river crossings, deserts, rocky climbs and gruelling conditions as they tackle 2,200 kilometers through the lands of Genghis Khan - all ride exactly the same make and model of motorcycle, so in at least one respect, the playing field is level.

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32
programme.desc: After making their debut in indomitable style in 2014, the unique flying catamarans literally "took off" on their first European Circuit in 2015. Building on the success of the America's Cup foiling catamarans, the GC32 takes the thrill of foiling to an extraordinary performance level in a fiercely fought five stage circuit raced across five iconic venues in Italy, Spain and France.

programme.title: Speed catamarans gc32

programme.title: Kite master/
programme.desc: Kite Masters is a series showcasing the latest news from the inspirational world of kite boarding - the action packed sport which continues to take the world by storm. Whether you are a kiteboarder - competitor or recreational, kiteboarding fan, interested observer or have ever wanted to give kiteboarding a go, then you are guaranteed to enjoy the Kite Masters series. There are a myriad of different disciplines in kiteboarding - racing to freestyle - for weekend warriors and the professional riders. Kite Masters checks in on them all and brings you the best round up of action from around the world.

programme.title: GP racing
programme.desc: The show delves into the world of F1 technology where teams try to gain split second advantages over their rivals with cutting-edge engineering. GP Racing covers the colorful global spectacle that is the F1 World Championship.

programme.title: Hankook 24h serie
programme.desc: The 2022 24H GT Series powered by Hankook was the eighth season of the 24H Series with drivers battling for championship points and titles and the thirteenth season since Creventic, the organiser and promoter of the series, organised multiple races a year. The races were contested with GT3-spec cars, GT4-spec cars, sports cars and 24H-Specials, like silhouette cars.

programme.title: Inside sailing
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Inside sailing
programme.desc: Inside Sailing contains highlights from top sailing and yachting events around the world. It is a documentary show which educates the audience about the secrets of sailing, presents several exciting sea-side locations and offers a flavor of yachting lifestyle.

programme.title: Cape epic
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world's premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through roughly 700km of unspoilt scenery and 15 000m of accumulated climbing, over some of the most magnificent mountain passes in Western Cape in South Africa. The Absa Cape Epic is the most televised mountain bike stage race in the world and the only eight-day mountain bike stage race classed as hors catégorie by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI). This official UCI status makes it a highlight on the professional racer's calendar. The Absa Cape Epic also attracts aspiring amateur riders wanting to test themselves against the best. It is a full-service race, meaning that everything is taken care of from the start - all riders need to think about is riding.

programme.title: Outdoor sports show
programme.desc: Following a successful first run, The Outdoor Sports Show has returned on screens in early 2018, by showcasing a diverse array of outdoor sports destined to reach again millions of audiences globally. There are no limits to the content of the Outdoor Sports Show, which covers everything, from professional and recreational to the extreme and adventure sports. From marathon races to climbing, skiing to surfing, hiking to triathlon, sailing to cycling - human meets nature on a thrilling journey of performance.

programme.title: Salomon gore - tex maxi race
programme.desc: More than just a trail-race the Maxi Race takes runners on an 85km journey around the unique landscape of Lake Annecy, France. Athletes choose the Ultra, Vertical-Race or Marathon, pushing themselves to develop mountain skills and face their own personal challenges. The Salomon Gore-Tex Maxi Race is one of the best and most demanding trail running events, staged in the stunning lake and mountain scenery of the Haute Savoie.
